inputs.label: Initial Capital Investment
inputs.businessContext: The upfront capital cost required for the process improvement or new equipment.

businessContext_i18n.en: The upfront capital cost required for the process improvement or new equipment.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Süreç iyileştirme veya yeni ekipman için gereken peşin sermaye maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die anfänglichen Kapitalkosten, die für die Prozessverbesserung oder neue Ausrüstung erforderlich sind.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût initial en capital requis pour l'amélioration du processus ou le nouvel équipement.
businessContext_i18n.es: El coste de capital inicial requerido para la mejora del proceso o el nuevo equipo.
businessContext_i18n.ar: التكلفة الرأسمالية الأولية المطلوبة لتحسين العملية أو المعدات الجديدة.

inputs.label: Annual Cost Savings
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual reduction in operating costs (e.g., labor, materials, energy) from the investment.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected annual reduction in operating costs (e.g., labor, materials, energy) from the investment.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yatırımdan beklenen yıllık işletme maliyeti azalması (ör. işçilik, malzeme, enerji).
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwartete jährliche Reduzierung der Betriebskosten (z. B. Arbeit, Material, Energie) durch die Investition.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Réduction annuelle attendue des coûts d'exploitation (par exemple, main-d'œuvre, matériaux, énergie) grâce à l'investissement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Reducción anual esperada en costes operativos (p. ej., mano de obra, materiales, energía) de la inversión.
businessContext_i18n.ar: التخفيض السنوي المتوقع في تكاليف التشغيل (مثل العمالة والمواد والطاقة) من الاستثمار.

inputs.label: Project Life
inputs.businessContext: The number of years over which the investment will generate savings.

businessContext_i18n.en: The number of years over which the investment will generate savings.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Anzahl der Jahre, über die die Investition Einsparungen generiert.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'années sur lesquelles l'investissement générera des économies.
businessContext_i18n.es: El número de años durante los cuales la inversión generará ahorros.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد السنوات التي سيحقق خلالها الاستثمار وفورات.

inputs.label: Discount Rate
inputs.businessContext: The annual discount rate reflecting the cost of capital or required rate of return.

businessContext_i18n.en: The annual discount rate reflecting the cost of capital or required rate of return.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sermaye maliyetini veya gerekli getiri oranını yansıtan yıllık iskonto oranı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der jährliche Abzinsungssatz, der die Kapitalkosten oder die geforderte Rendite widerspiegelt.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux d'actualisation annuel reflétant le coût du capital ou le taux de rendement requis.
businessContext_i18n.es: La tasa de descuento anual que refleja el coste de capital o la tasa de rendimiento requerida.
businessContext_i18n.ar: معدل الخصم السنوي الذي يعكس تكلفة رأس المال أو معدل العائد المطلوب.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
